channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: VoltAgent /awesome-agent-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A curated collection of 1000+ agent skills from official dev teams and the community, compatible with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and more.

item.title: chiphuyen /aie-book | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: [WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)

item.title: coreyhaines31 /marketingskills | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

item.title: mksglu /context-mode | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 12 platforms

item.title: microsoft /onnxruntime | C++ | N/A
item.description: ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator

item.title: cline /cline | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.title: microsoft /ai-agents-for-beginners | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

item.title: open-metadata /OpenMetadata | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

item.title: Alishahryar1 /free-claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw

item.title: Anil-matcha /Open-Generative-AI | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik, Krea, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

item.title: ruvnet /RuView | Rust | N/A
item.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

item.title: Z4nzu /hackingtool | Python | N/A
item.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers

item.title: zilliztech /claude-context | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.

item.title: huggingface /ml-intern | Python | N/A
item.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
